zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Corbet於1375年5月7日出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利時，她的父親Fulk de Corbet39歲，母親Elizabeth de Corbet36歲。她於1380年與John de la Pole結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年之前在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Corbet was born on 7 May 1375, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Fulk de Corbet, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth de Corbet, was 36. She married John de la Pole in 1380. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 1403, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England.

Elle a épousé John de la Pole en 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1403, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Corbetが1375年5月7日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Fulk de Corbetは39歳，母Elizabeth de Corbetは36歳であった。1380年にJohn de la Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年以前にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Corbet(이)가 1375년 5월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulk de Corbet(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Corbet(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1380년 John de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 이전 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 사망했다.
